corrections.current: Β παιδίας ἐν δικαιοσύνῃ αὐτοῦ ἐπέβησαν.
corrections.correct: Β παιδίας ἐν δικαιοσύνῃ αὐτοῦ ἐπέβησαν. 14ἐλθάτωσαν αἱ πάροικοι
corrections.note: The line continues with the start of v. 14, omitted from the transcription.

corrections.current: ὁ γὰρ ἐπαγαγὼν τὰ κακὰ ἐξελεῖται ὑμᾶς 18 ἐκ χειρὸς ἐχθρῶν ὑμῶν.
corrections.correct: ὁ γὰρ ἐπαγαγὼν τὰ κακὰ ἐξελεῖται ὑμᾶς ἐκ χειρὸς ἐχθρῶν ὑμῶν.
corrections.note: A marginal line number 18 has been inserted into the body text.
The apparatus reads Qᵃ, not Q*.
The nomen sacrum is correctly present; no change needed.

corrections.correct: ἢ ει υ sup ras Bᵃ
corrections.note: There is a separator and preceding eta before the note in the printed apparatus.
Extraneous closing parenthesis at end of apparatus note.
Latin letters 'as' were used instead of Greek with accent.
Printed apparatus reads ἐπιστραφέντες for the B* form.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct, but one omitted phrase at 4:14 and one captured marginal line number. Apparatus largely matches; one siglum misread, one stray parenthesis, one mixed-script form, and one likely omission in the B* reading. The transcription's nomen sacrum at line 15 appears correct and should not be altered.
